Video.summary: Ijwaun and Terrika are back for another DNA test; Molly and Kendall seek DNA results.
Video.title: I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce

Image.alt: I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce
I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce
I Don't Care If You're Pregnant I Still Want A Divorce

Video.summary: Roxanne and Andrew have 2 children together, but she is cracking from the physical abuse. Andrew says he’s worried she’s been cheating on him and doesn’t know if the children are his! Can Steve’s test results save their relationship?
Video.title: Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage

Image.alt: Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage
Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage
Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage

Video.summary: Angel claims that her father Ronald abused her sexually, forced her to do drugs and even got her addicted to crack when she was 18. His other daughter Tracy also claims he’s tried to abuse her several times, but Ronald says he’s innocent!
Video.title: Devil Dad

Image.alt: Devil Dad
Devil Dad
Devil Dad

Video.summary: Russell wants to put his family back together after his 3 children died in a fire. Next, Tatiana believes her 2-year old nephew was abused. And she's accusing her sister's ex-fiance Chris. Chris says he's not an abuser.
Video.title: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
Did You Leave My Kids to Die?

Video.summary: Kimberly’s son was born with a rare disease and she suspected the child’s father of stealing money for his medical treatment. Then, Avonte was diagnosed with a rare form of cancer and never saw a dime from his aunt Terceira’s fundraiser for him!
Video.title: Who Stole From My Disabled Son?

Image.alt: Who Stole From My Disabled Son?
Who Stole From My Disabled Son?
Who Stole From My Disabled Son?

Video.summary: Anthony believes his ex, Erica and her new boyfriend Jeremy are abusing his son. Next, Lacey is being accused, by her aunt, of physically abusing and neglecting her two young children.
Video.title: Young Mothers Accused of Abuse

Image.alt: Young Mothers Accused of Abuse
Young Mothers Accused of Abuse
Young Mothers Accused of Abuse

Video.summary: Sheila fears that her teen grand-daughter is having sex with a 26-year old family-friend. Then, Jaquella started dating her boyfriend Shaquille when he was a teen. Shaquille's mother is here to confront Jaquella for sleeping with her child.
Video.title: Why Are You Dating A Child?

Image.alt: Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?

Video.summary: Marlon claims he caught Bernard molesting his own nephew two years ago! Bernard and his sister accuse Marlon of lying! Later, Tarone found out his sister’s boyfriend Donald molested their daughter. Donald says he mistook her for her aunt Felitha!
Video.title: An Unexpected Confession

Image.alt: An Unexpected Confession
An Unexpected Confession
An Unexpected Confession

Video.summary: Today on Steve Wilkos, Steven is desperate to find out who is the real father of his 3 year old son. He found out that his ex, Shannon, was intimate with 3 of his best friends when she got pregnant.
Video.title: Angry Dad Demands DNA

Image.alt: Angry Dad Demands DNA
Angry Dad Demands DNA
Angry Dad Demands DNA

Video.summary: Bobbie says that her daughter Cindy’s home was filled with so many dangerous animals that she was forced to report her to child protective services because she felt her grandchild was in danger. But Cindy says Bobbie has another agenda!
Video.title: A Dangerous Household

Image.alt: A Dangerous Household
A Dangerous Household
A Dangerous Household

Video.summary: Lorri is here because she believes that her grandson is being abused by his mother Alyssa and her ex-boyfriend Josh. She's here to find out the truth about whether or not they are really guilty of this abuse.
Video.title: Did You Bite and Beat My Son?

Image.alt: Did You Bite and Beat My Son?
Did You Bite and Beat My Son?
Did You Bite and Beat My Son?

Video.summary: Keith has been accused of touching his 3-year-old son inappropriately by Crystal, the mother of his children, which he strongly denies. He says this is the result of her anger over an affair he had. But will the lie detector test prove him right?
Video.title: I Stand Accused

Image.alt: I Stand Accused
I Stand Accused
I Stand Accused

Video.summary: After breaking up, Janell gave birth to their second child, but does not allow Rolando to be alone with the child because she believes that he abused their first baby. Then, Kayla is 14 years old and pregnant with Garret's child.
Video.title: Too Young to Be Parents

Image.alt: Too Young to Be Parents
Too Young to Be Parents
Too Young to Be Parents

Video.summary: Kenny, a former correctional officer, was sent to the same prison he worked at after stealing from his mom, writing bad checks in his dead grandfather’s name, and putting a knife to his mom’s throat. Will Kenny be able to turn his life around?
Video.title: My Son’s Going to Kill Me

Image.alt: My Son’s Going to Kill Me
My Son’s Going to Kill Me
My Son’s Going to Kill Me

Video.summary: James learned that his new wife may have been cheating with his cousin; Marissa left her doubting boyfriend two days after her baby was born, and now he wants the truth; Lyric wants to prove to Jeff's family that her baby is his.
Video.title: Steve, I Hope I'm the Father

Image.alt: Steve, I Hope I'm the Father
Steve, I Hope I'm the Father
Steve, I Hope I'm the Father

Video.summary: Tamara's man quit his job, but, inexplicably, still has money coming in, and she thinks she knows why; Rainy says she caught her boyfriend responding to ads for sex with men and transsexuals.
Video.title: Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money

Image.alt: Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money
Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money
Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money

Video.summary: Holly says her mother is envious of her and has made up accusations that she has been sleeping with her stepfather; Jovanni reacts to his girlfriend's ironclad proof that he is cheating.
Video.title: Are My Husband and Daughter Having Sex?

Image.alt: Are My Husband and Daughter Having Sex?
Are My Husband and Daughter Having Sex?
Are My Husband and Daughter Having Sex?

Video.summary: After 10 years of searching, Brenda will reunite with her kids and address abuse allegations. Then, Cassidy wed Paul 5 days after she split with PJ, but is he molesting her and PJ’s son? Or is PJ the monster who burned their son’s feet?
Video.title: "I'm Terrified of the Results"

Image.alt: "I'm Terrified of the Results"
"I'm Terrified of the Results"
"I'm Terrified of the Results"

Video.summary: Grace wants to expose ex-boyfriend Kenny for destroying her teen years and denying their child. Then, Kendra suspects boyfriend Brandon is cheating on her with his ex Monique, and she thinks he has the STD to prove it!
Video.title: You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?

Image.alt: You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?
You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?
You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?

Video.summary: Recaps of several stories that involve deplorable acts committed against children.
Video.title: Voice of the Victims

Image.alt: Voice of the Victims
Voice of the Victims
Voice of the Victims

Video.summary: Paternity test results could keep Cortez and Mallory's family together or tear them asunder.
Video.title: Confession Leads to Stunning Reactions

Image.alt: Confession Leads to Stunning Reactions
Confession Leads to Stunning Reactions
Confession Leads to Stunning Reactions

Video.summary: Sabrina’s grandkids were under state custody 3 different times due to reports of neglect, physical and sexual abuse. Their dad refuses to let them near her. Next, Rose saw 2nd degree burns on her son. Did his step-mom Alecia intentionally burn him?
Video.title: My Daughter Is a Worthless Mother

Image.alt: My Daughter Is a Worthless Mother
My Daughter Is a Worthless Mother
My Daughter Is a Worthless Mother

Video.summary: Pregnant Natasha kicked out her children's father because she suspects he is cheating, possibly with a member of his own family; Aaron denies being his fiancee's baby's dad.
Video.title: You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?

Image.alt: You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?
You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?
You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?

Video.summary: 14 year old Rusty called our show because he says that he can no longer deal with his parent's constant fighting. He says that in the past they've hit each other, thrown appliances at each other and even bit him. His mother Mildred says that she and her husband Russell always fight and abuse each other because she suspects Russell of cheating.
Video.title: Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help

Image.alt: Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help
Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help
Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help

Video.summary: In order to avoid charges, Christi abandons her ten year old daughter and leaves the state. Her daughter wants to give her one last chance to take responsibility and be in her life.
Video.title: Mommy, Go To Jail For Me

Image.alt: Mommy, Go To Jail For Me
Mommy, Go To Jail For Me
Mommy, Go To Jail For Me

Video.summary: Ashley’s first love, Chris, betrayed her for her sister and now faces abuse allegations.
Video.title: He Left Me For My Sister

Image.alt: He Left Me For My Sister
He Left Me For My Sister
He Left Me For My Sister

Video.summary: Tacarra has been with Jaray for 5 years and raising two children together. But now she feels the passion has died and his coldness towards her has driven her crazy, and now she questions her marriage, and Jaray's honesty.
Video.title: Is It Love ... Or Lies?

Image.alt: Is It Love ... Or Lies?
Is It Love ... Or Lies?
Is It Love ... Or Lies?

Video.summary: Destiny is accused of being a pathological liar and faking her own pregnancy and miscarriage with her once boyfriend.
Video.title: DNA Shocker

Image.alt: DNA Shocker
DNA Shocker
DNA Shocker

Video.summary: Ritchie received a video that appeared to be of his longtime girlfriend having sex with someone else; Jason's sister-in-law says he tried to seduce her.
Video.title: I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?

Image.alt: I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?
I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?
I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?

Video.summary: Steve will put Brittany’s sister Jami and boyfriend Luis to the lie detector test to find out if Luis coerced Jami into having sex. Then, did Cassandra sleep with her husband Greg’s brother Collin? Is Collin their child’s father? Find out today!
Video.title: Betrayed By My Family?

Image.alt: Betrayed By My Family?
Betrayed By My Family?
Betrayed By My Family?

Video.summary: A stay-at-home mom believes her boyfriend is going out and cheating on her; Melanie's old friends have been meddling in her marriage with James.
Video.title: She Checks Me But I'm Not Cheating

Image.alt: She Checks Me But I'm Not Cheating
She Checks Me But I'm Not Cheating
She Checks Me But I'm Not Cheating

Video.summary: Victoria says Dewayne harasses her, calls her horrible names and is physically abusive toward her; wedding plans are on hold until Trenell can pass a lie detector test.
Video.title: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Image.alt: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
